artifact_type_inferred: Screenshot of Hazen Report Creator Software Monthly Operating Report
artifact_summary: A screenshot of a water treatment monthly operating report generated by Hazen Report Creator Software, featuring pump runtime metrics and maintenance status indicators.
artifact_blurb: This image displays a 'Monthly Operating Report' produced by Hazen Report Creator Software, specifically tailored for water treatment facilities. The document aggregates high-level operational metrics and presents a granular data table tracking individual pump assets. Key data points include specific part numbers, accumulated run hours, scheduled maintenance deadlines, and visual progress bars that utilize color-coding to instantly communicate maintenance urgency and status.
